title: Amethyst to Rose Quartz
description: An amethyst is a purple shaded quartz so... why not replace it with a pinkier one?
body:
# Rose Quartz
Since amethysts are quartzes, I figured, why not change them for other shades of quartz? So, maybe I'll make some more like this.

## Features
Everything is changed: the blocks, the items, the armor trim colors. If you use [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone), then even the color of the blocks in a map will change.

## Language support
I included support for English (US), LOLCAT and Spanish (all of them), if you want another language added, write a comment in the [planet minecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/rose-quartz-6334251/)

## Previews
![A rose quartz geode viewed with night vision effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/owGbpjcU/images/5a37a67a64a76c6aed71c53bb78b8af305bbb38a.png)
![A netherite chestplate with an armor trim showing a pink-ish color, both in item and entity form](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/owGbpjcU/images/653ae3b2637279cca50e266008994c95a152b666.png)
![A calibrated sculk sensor with a pink shard incrusted in it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/owGbpjcU/images/074a5a9d2dc7b5a12df9ad8a72ca4ab7d0008d94.png)
